name: Wolfhouse Booking Assistant - Luna Pipe Shadow

meta.description: Phase 19f.2 Luna pipe shadow workflow. INACTIVE / NOT IMPORTED into production n8n. Test webhook only — never activate for live WhatsApp. Path: Set shadow flags -> IF guard -> normalize Meta WhatsApp inbound -> POST /staff/bot/guest-reply-draft -> build send payload + idempotency_key -> IF send eligible -> POST /staff/bot/guest-reply-send (when eligible) -> respond debug. Webhook path: luna-pipe-shadow-19f (NOT booking-assistant). X-Luna-Bot-Token via n8n Header Auth credential Luna Bot Internal Token (staging) — bind at import, never hardcoded. No graph.facebook.com. No api.stripe.com. No booking-create. No payment-link. No Stripe webhook. No n8n activation. Staff API owns send decision.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "shadow_guard_blocked", "detail": "shadow_mode is not true; refusing Luna pipe path", "draft_success": false, "send_attempted": false, "send_performed": false, "sends_whatsapp": false, "live_send_blocked": true, "whatsapp_message_id": null }

nodes.name: IF - Send Eligible / Has Suggested Reply
